changes.description: Replaced verbose 9,884-byte systematic debugging methodology with concise 4,035-byte practical bug-fixing guide. Removed all supporting files (root-cause-tracing.md, defense-in-depth.md, condition-based-waiting.md, etc.) not referenced by the new SKILL.md. New skill provides step-by-step procedure with worked examples for both off-by-one and race condition bugs, emphasizes no-line-numbers rule for file writing, and includes concrete fix patterns.
